description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a long, slender barrel and a robust wooden stock, likely made from walnut or a similar hardwood. The receiver and barrel assembly are constructed from dark, matte-finished metal, giving it a utilitarian and durable appearance. The rifle is equipped with a detachable box magazine, positioned just ahead of the trigger guard, and a prominent pistol grip for improved handling. Iron sights are mounted along the top of the barrel, providing basic aiming capability. The muzzle end appears to have a standard flash hider, and the overall build suggests a military or paramilitary application. The combination of wood and metal materials gives the rifle a traditional yet functional aesthetic.
description: A traditional rifle with a wooden stock, metal receiver, detachable box magazine, and iron sights, featuring a long barrel and a flash hider.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the wooden stock, metal receiver, magazine, and barrel with flash hider.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, flash hider, and the narrow profile of the barrel and fore-end.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, metal receiver, magazine, and barrel, mirroring the details of view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel, with the pistol grip and magazine partially visible.
